Component.Name: ItemEdit
Component.Caption: C(ItemStatic)
Component.Validators: SetRevisionTrack,SetComponentFromList(TrackPieces,ItemTrackPiecesHidden),SetComponentFromList(DimensionGroup,ItemDimensionGroupHidden),PsItem(DerItem, Whse, ItemDescription, ItemSerialTracked, ItemLotTracked, ItemLotPrefix, Loc, , UbUM, , PromptMsg, PromptButtons, DerEnableContainer)

Component.Name: LocationEdit
Component.Caption: C(LocationStatic)
Component.Validators: RvallocSiteVar(Parm_Site,Whse,DerItem,Loc,LocPromptMsg,LocPromptButtons),Ask(LocPromptMsg, LocPromptButtons, AddLocReturnUserAction),Rvalloc.AddLoc(Whse,DerItem,Loc),Rloclot(V(Parm_Site), P(DerItem), P(Whse), P(Loc), V(RefNumVar), V(RefTypeVar), P(ItemLotTracked), Lot,)
Component.ComboListSource: STDOLE SL.SLItemLocs( PROPERTIES(Loc, QtyOnHand) DISTINCT() FILTER(Whse = FP(Whse) AND Item = FP(DerItem) AND LocType = 'S' )ORDERBY(Loc))

Component.Name: LotEdit
Component.Caption: C(LotStatic)
Component.Validators: Rvallot2(DerItem, Lot, AddLot, PromptMsg, PromptButtons, , QtyComplete, UbLotTrxRestrictCode),GenerateEventNoMsg(NextLot),GenerateEventNoMsg(PreLotAdd)

Component.Name: static2_SITE
Component.DataSource: variables.HIL_Note(INITIALVALUE(JiT must not be used for Lot or Serial Tracked Items. E.G. Cylkits or Frames))

EventHandler.Name: AddContainer
EventHandler.Response: SLContainers.ContainerAddSp( PARMS(VAR V(vAddContainer_Container), VAR V(vAddContainer_Whse), VAR V(vAddContainer_Loc), MESSAGE) ERRORMESSAGE(mValidatorMethodMessage) )

EventHandler.Name: AddLocation
EventHandler.Response: SL.SLItemLocs.ItemLocAddSp( PARMS(VAR P(Whse), VAR P(DerItem), VAR P(Loc), VAR 0, VAR 0, VAR 0, VAR 0, VAR 0, VAR 0, VAR 0, VAR 0, RVAR V(IgnoreVar), MESSAGE) ERRORMESSAGE(mBackendMessage) )

EventHandler.Name: AddLot
EventHandler.Response: SL.SLTrnacts.LotAddPreSp( PARMS(VAR P(DerItem), VAR P(Lot), RVAR V(PromptMsg), RVAR V(PromptButtons), VAR V(Parm_Site)) ERRORMESSAGE(mBackendMessage) )

EventHandler.Name: AddLot
EventHandler.Response: SL.SLLots.LotAddSp( PARMS(VAR P(DerItem), VAR P(Lot), VAR 0, VAR 0, VAR, VAR 1, VAR V(Revision), MESSAGE, VAR V(Parm_Site), VAR , VAR , VAR P(UbLotTrxRestrictCode)) ERRORMESSAGE(mBackendMessage) )

EventHandler.Name: DoProcess
EventHandler.Response: SLJobTrans.JustInTimeGenerateTransNumSp( PARMS(VAR V(SessionId), RVAR V(TransNum), MESSAGE) )

EventHandler.Name: DoProcess
EventHandler.Response: SL.SLJobTrans.JustInTimeTransactionSp( PARMS(VAR P(DerItem), VAR P(QtyComplete), VAR P(Whse), VAR P(Loc), VAR P(Lot), VAR P(TransDate), VAR P(Shift), VAR P(EmpNum), VAR V(PostNeg), VAR P(UbSerialPrefix), VAR V(SessionId), MESSAGE, VAR P(UbContainerNum), VAR V(DocumentNumVar)) ERRORMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) SUCCESSMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) )

EventHandler.Name: DoProcess
EventHandler.Response: SLJobTrans.RSQC_CreateJITReceiverSp( PARMS(VAR P(QtyComplete), VAR P(Whse), VAR P(DerItem), VAR JobOrders, RVAR V(vPopUp), RVAR V(vPrintTag), RVAR V(vRcvrNums), RVAR V(vMessages), MESSAGE) )

EventHandler.Name: EnableSerialTab
EventHandler.Response: SLTrxRestrictCodeTrans.ValidateRestrictedTransSp( PARMS(VAR P(JobItem), VAR P(Lot), VAR, VAR R, MESSAGE) ERRORMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) )

EventHandler.Name: GetItemsSerialPrefix
EventHandler.Response: SL.SLTrnActs.GetItemSerialPrefixSp( PARMS(VAR P(DerItem), VAR , RVAR P(UbSerialPrefix), MESSAGE) ERRORMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) )

EventHandler.Name: ItemDataChanged
EventHandler.Response: SLItems( FILTER(Item = FP(DerItem) and LotTracked = 1 and TrackEcn = 1) SONON() SETV(Revision=Revision) )

EventHandler.Name: ItemLocAdd
EventHandler.Response: SL.SLItemLocs.ItemLocAddSp( PARMS(VAR V(vAddLoc_Whse), VAR V(vAddLoc_Item), VAR V(vAddLoc_Loc), VAR V(vAddLoc_Zero), VAR V(vAddLoc_Zero), VAR V(vAddLoc_Zero), VAR V(vAddLoc_Zero), VAR V(vAddLoc_Zero), VAR V(vAddLoc_Zero), VAR V(vAddLoc_Zero), VAR V(vAddLoc_Zero), RVAR V(vAddLoc_Empty), RVAR V(vInfobar)) ERRORMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) )

EventHandler.Name: LaunchContainersAsModal
EventHandler.Response: Containers( FILTER(Whse = FP(Whse) AND Loc = FP(Loc) AND ConitemItem = FP(DerItem) AND ISNULL(ConitemItemLot,CHAR(1)) = ISNULL(FP(Lot),CHAR(1))) SETVARVALUES(InitialCommand=Refresh) )

EventHandler.Name: LaunchQC_IPReceiverInformation
EventHandler.Response: QC_IPReceiverInformation( FILTER(RcvrNum = FV(vRcvrNum)) SETVARVALUES(ParentFromItem = V(vRcvrNum), ParentFromItem2=P(DerItem),ParentFormName = ProductionScheduleItems) IGNOREFAILURE() )

EventHandler.Name: LotAdd
EventHandler.Response: AddLot( OKCANCELOPTIONAL() POPUP() SETVARVALUES(Item=P(DerItem), Lot=C(LotEdit), RcvdQty=0, Revision=V(Revision), Site=V(Parm_Site)) )

EventHandler.Name: NextLotSp
EventHandler.Response: SL.SLItems.FetchNextLotSp( PARMS(VAR P(JobItem), VAR V(LotPrefix), MESSAGE, RVAR P(Lot)) ERRORMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) )

EventHandler.Name: RSQCGetMessageStack
EventHandler.Response: MGCore.DefineVariables.GetVariableSp( PARMS(VAR RSQCMessageStack, VAR, VAR 0, RVAR V(vRSQCMessageStack), MESSAGE) )

EventHandler.Name: RSQCGetPopUp
EventHandler.Response: MGCore.DefineVariables.GetVariableSp( PARMS(VAR RSQCPopUp, VAR, VAR 0, RVAR V(vRSQCPopUp), MESSAGE) )

EventHandler.Name: RSQCGetPrintTag
EventHandler.Response: MGCore.DefineVariables.GetVariableSp( PARMS(VAR RSQCPrintTag, VAR, VAR 0, RVAR V(vRSQCPrintTag), MESSAGE) )

EventHandler.Name: RSQCGetRcvrNumStack
EventHandler.Response: MGCore.DefineVariables.GetVariableSp( PARMS(VAR RSQCRcvrNumStack, VAR, VAR 0, RVAR V(vRSQCRcvrNumStack), MESSAGE) )

EventHandler.Name: RSQCGetSequenceStack
EventHandler.Response: MGCore.DefineVariables.GetVariableSp( PARMS(VAR RSQCSequenceStack, VAR, VAR 0, RVAR V(vRSQCSequenceStack), MESSAGE) )

EventHandler.Name: RSQCGetStatusStack
EventHandler.Response: MGCore.DefineVariables.GetVariableSp( PARMS(VAR RSQCStatusStack, VAR, VAR 0, RVAR V(vRSQCStatusStack), MESSAGE) )

EventHandler.Name: SerNumGetNext
EventHandler.Response: SL.SLTrnacts.GetMaxSerialNumSiteSp( PARMS(VAR V(SerPrefixVar), VAR V(Parm_Site), RVAR V(MaxSerNum), VAR P(DerItem)) ERRORMESSAGE(mBackendMessage) )

EventHandler.Name: SetNextContainerNum
EventHandler.Response: SLContainers.GetNextContainerNumSp( PARMS(RVAR P(UbContainerNum), VAR V(FormCurWhse), VAR P(Loc), MESSAGE) )

EventHandler.Name: StdFormPredisplay
EventHandler.Response: SLFormAdoption.LoadBannerStatus( PARMS(VAR V(CurrentFormName), RVAR V(DisableBanner), RVAR V(EndOfSupport), RVAR V(NewFormName), RVAR V(ToastStatus)) )

EventHandler.Name: StdObjectRefreshCompleted
EventHandler.Response: DefineVariables.GetVariableSp( PARMS(VAR CLM_LoadBackflushSp.Infobar, VAR, VAR 1, RVAR V(MessageVar), MESSAGE) )

EventHandler.Name: ValidateQtyForRcvIntoContainer
EventHandler.Response: SLContainers.ValidateQtyForRcvIntoContainerSp( PARMS(VAR P(DerItem), VAR P(Whse), VAR P(Loc), VAR P(Lot), VAR V(Parm_Site), MESSAGE) ERRORMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) SUCCESSMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) )

Variable.Name: cds_DataSourceBackflushLotsGrid
Variable.Value: object.SLBflushLots.CLM_LoadBackflushSp( V(cdsmp1_BackflushLotsGrid) CA(V) OBJNAME(oBackflushLots) UPD(BflushLotSaveSp(UbTransNum,UbWhse,UbLot,UbSelect,UbJob,UbJobSuffix,UbJobOperNum,UbJobMatlSeq,UbEmpNum,UbItem,UbLoc,UbQtyNeeded,UbQuantity,UbWc,UbUm,UbTransClass,UbTransSeq,,)) BECOMESPRIMARY() LOCKMODE(Row) )

Variable.Name: cdsmp1_BackflushLotsGrid
Variable.Value: PARMS(VAR 1, VAR K, VAR, VAR, VAR, VAR, VAR C(ItemEdit), VAR, VAR, VAR, VAR P(TransDate), VAR P(Whse), VAR, VAR P(QtyComplete), VAR 0, VAR C(EmpNumEdit), MESSAGE, VAR 0)

Variable.Name: cdsmp1_BackflushSerialsGrid
Variable.Value: PARMS(VAR 0, VAR K, VAR, VAR, VAR, VAR, VAR P(DerItem), VAR, VAR, VAR, VAR P(TransDate), VAR P(Whse), VAR V(SelectedBflushLots), VAR P(QtyComplete), VAR 0, VAR C(EmpNumEdit), MESSAGE, VAR 0)

Variable.Name: cdsmp1_PiecesGrid
Variable.Value: PARMS(VAR P(DerItem), VAR P(Whse), VAR P(Loc), VAR P(Lot), VAR , VAR V(SubFilterString))

Variable.Name: cdsmp1_SerialGrid
Variable.Value: PARMS(VAR P(SLSerials.SerNum), BSTR G, BSTR R, VAR V(SerStat), VAR 0, VAR 0, VAR P(DerItem), VAR P(Whse), VAR P(Loc), VAR P(Lot), VAR, VAR 0, VAR, VAR 0, VAR 0, VAR, VAR 0, VAR 0, VAR V(Parm_Site), VAR V(ImportDocId), VAR, VAR, VAR, VAR, VAR)

Variable.Name: ehm1_GetAttrGridColCaption0
Variable.Value: PARMS(VAR V(PAttrGroupClass), VAR V(PAttrGroup), RVAR V(PDeciAttr1Label), RVAR V(PDeciAttr2Label), RVAR V(PDeciAttr3Label), RVAR V(PDeciAttr4Label), RVAR V(PDeciAttr5Label), RVAR V(PDeciAttr6Label), RVAR V(PDeciAttr7Label), RVAR V(PDeciAttr8Label), RVAR V(PDeciAttr9Label), RVAR V(PDeciAttr10Label), RVAR V(PCharAttr1Label), RVAR V(PCharAttr2Label), RVAR V(PCharAttr3Label), RVAR V(PCharAttr4Label), RVAR V(PCharAttr5Label), RVAR V(PCharAttr6Label), RVAR V(PCharAttr7Label), RVAR V(PCharAttr8Label),
Variable.Value2: RVAR V(PCharAttr9Label), RVAR V(PCharAttr10Label), RVAR V(PLogiAttrLabel))

Variable.Name: ehm1_GetAttrGridColCaption1
Variable.Value: PARMS(VAR V(PAttrGroupClass), VAR V(PAttrGroup), RVAR V(PDeciAttr1Label), RVAR V(PDeciAttr2Label), RVAR V(PDeciAttr3Label), RVAR V(PDeciAttr4Label), RVAR V(PDeciAttr5Label), RVAR V(PDeciAttr6Label), RVAR V(PDeciAttr7Label), RVAR V(PDeciAttr8Label), RVAR V(PDeciAttr9Label), RVAR V(PDeciAttr10Label), RVAR V(PCharAttr1Label), RVAR V(PCharAttr2Label), RVAR V(PCharAttr3Label), RVAR V(PCharAttr4Label), RVAR V(PCharAttr5Label), RVAR V(PCharAttr6Label), RVAR V(PCharAttr7Label), RVAR V(PCharAttr8Label),
Variable.Value2: RVAR V(PCharAttr9Label), RVAR V(PCharAttr10Label), RVAR V(PLogiAttrLabel))

Variable.Name: HIL_Note
Variable.Value: ~LIT~(JiT must not be used for Lot or Serial Tracked Items. E.G. Cylkits or Frames)

Variable.Name: SvallotParmsVar
Variable.Value: UbWhse, ItmItem, UbLoc, UbLot, "ISS", 0, STRINGS(fWorkCenterMaterialTransactions), PromptAddMsg, PromptAddButtons, PromptExpLotMsg, PromptExpLotButtons

ScriptLines.ScriptLine: ' Enable/disable the serial number grid and tab if the item is not serial tracked
If Not Enable And ThisForm.Components("ItemEdit").Value = "" Then
' Enable the Serial tab only when these conditions are met
' Put the focus on an enabled tab
If ThisForm.Components("SerialTab").Enabled = True And bEnabled = False Then
' Generate serial is used to make serial numbers and query them. It is only disabled
' if the user is adding serials and the remote expand flag is off.
' Set up a form variable to make it easy to determine whether serial number entry
oSerNumCache.New() ' Create a slot for data entry
' If the quantity changes, then the target qty is set to the absolute value of that qty.
' This routine recalculates the generate qty to be the number of serial numbers
' still needed to fulfill the transaction. It is not allowed below 0.
' The user has to select as many serialized parts as required to meet the target qty.
' When a select box is unchecked, if the serial numbers are being created, then the
' row is removed. If the serial numbers are queried and just selected, then the row
' This routine either selects or deselects the target qty number of rows based on
' whether doSelect is true or false.
Sub GenerateSelection(ByVal bolSelect As Boolean, ByVal iRangeQty As Decimal)
' If the user is entering serial numbers, then deselected serial numbers are removed
If oSubCol.NewEnabled And Not bolSelect Then
' The parameter indicates if all items should be selected (1) or deselected (0).
oSerNumCache.RecordCapOverride = CInt(Qty) ' Retrieve this many records
oSerNumCache.ClearEntries() ' Wipe out the old stuff
oSerNumCache.New() ' Create a slot for data entry
' This script resets all selected rows as modified. It is run after the serials are
' saved in case the entire ship transaction fails so the user won't have to reselect
' The user is asked if they want to clear the serial numbers or not when the trnitem
If oSubCol.GetNumEntries > 0 And ThisForm.PrimaryIDOCollection.GetCurrentObjectProperty("ItemSerialTracked") = "1" And oSubCol.IsCollectionModified = True Then
' Copied from the same script in PurchaseOrderReceiving and then removed the
' extra collection level processing since this form has only one parent.
Function SelectMaxSerNumFromCache(ByVal sPrefix As String) As Integer
' This is necessary to get the largest SerNum on the cache.
' Need to check all SerNums for any Serial Tracked Items
' if prefix length = 30 the loop is significantly different than if the prefix < 30.
' Here, loop through until you find one instance of sCurrSerNum = sPrefix
Do While k < iSerNumCount And sSerNumMax = "0"
Else 'if the length of the prefix <> 30
' When new serial numbers are generated, they are not auto-select by that script. This
' script goes back and sets the select checkbox for those newly added rows.
Function SelectJustInsertedRows(ByVal QtySelected As Decimal) As Integer
For idx = oSerCache.GetCurrentObjectIndex To oSerCache.GetCurrentObjectIndex + 1 - QtySelected Step -1
' Loop through Collection to get Qty Selected
' (Trying to increment and decrement the number when the data changes is not reliable)
